title: Tailored Applications, Work Samples, and References · Cumulative Campaign Review
summary: A delayed hiring review reconstructs tailored applications, work samples, and references from target, claim, evidence, audience, action, observation, changed case, rejected failure, repair, consent, owner, and next-decision evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for auditable role-specific application packet after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Select and reorder truthful evidence from the role matrix without keyword stuffing or mirroring unsupported requirements.
Write a concise evidence bridge between the organization problem, relevant contribution, specific proof, and next conversation.
Choose or create a bounded work sample that demonstrates the prioritized behavior without exposing protected material or doing unpaid production work.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Tailoring Map · changed case · Review Tailoring Map
steps.instruction:
review case — A generic packet mechanically mirrors a listing, exposes a private work sample, and supplies reference contact details without permission. The review variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Select and reorder truthful evidence from the role matrix without keyword stuffing or mirroring unsupported requirements.

Which action demonstrates Tailoring Map without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Tailoring Map · changed case · Review Tailoring Map.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for select and reorder truthful evidence from the role matrix without keyword stuffing or mirroring unsupported requirements. For Tailoring Map · changed case · Review Tailoring Map, keep Tailoring Map connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: A generic packet mechanically mirrors a listing, exposes a private work sample, and supplies reference contact details without permission. The review variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Select and reorder truthful evidence from the role matrix without keyword stuffing or mirroring unsupported requirements.

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Tailoring Map condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: EEOC Disability Discrimination and Employment Decisions — Controls U.S.-specific applicant accommodation, confidentiality, pre-offer inquiry, and employment-decision boundaries while requiring local qualified guidance elsewhere.

options.text: Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

steps.title: Record what required effort · Review Submission Proof
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Submission Proof: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A generic packet mechanically mirrors a listing, exposes a private work sample, and supplies reference contact details without permission. content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Verify instructions, truthful consistency, file accessibility, links, permissions, privacy, final rendering, receipt, and retained revision.
